modules/cache/cache_socache_common.h

16
17/**
18 * @file cache_socache_common.h
19 * @brief Common Shared Object Cache vars/structs
20 *
21 * @defgroup Cache_cache  Cache Functions
22 * @ingroup  MOD_SOCACHE_CACHE
23 * @{
24 */ view japanese
25
26#ifndef CACHE_SOCACHE_COMMON_H
27#define CACHE_SOCACHE_COMMON_H
28
29#include "apr_time.h"
30
31#include "cache_common.h"
32
33#define CACHE_SOCACHE_VARY_FORMAT_VERSION 1
34#define CACHE_SOCACHE_DISK_FORMAT_VERSION 2
35
36typedef struct {
37    /* Indicates the format of the header struct stored on-disk. */ view japanese
38    apr_uint32_t format;
39    /* The HTTP status code returned for this response.  */ view japanese
40    int status;
41    /* The size of the entity name that follows. */ view japanese
42    apr_size_t name_len;
43    /* The number of times we've cached this entity. */ view japanese
44    apr_size_t entity_version;
45    /* Miscellaneous time values. */ view japanese
46    apr_time_t date;
47    apr_time_t expire;
48    apr_time_t request_time;
49    apr_time_t response_time;
50    /* Does this cached request have a body? */ view japanese
51    unsigned int header_only:1;
52    /* The parsed cache control header */ view japanese
53    cache_control_t control;
54} cache_socache_info_t;
55
56#endif /* CACHE_SOCACHE_COMMON_H */ view japanese
57/** @} */ view japanese

Japanese translation

modules/cache/cache_socache_common.h:17-24

/**
 * @file cache_socache_common.h
 * @brief 共有オブジェクトキャッシュの共通変数/構造体
 *
 * @defgroup Cache_cache  キャッシュ関数
 * @ingroup  MOD_SOCACHE_CACHE
 * @{
 */

Original comment
